skills.name: Alerting Rules
skills.description: Design alerting rules for production monitoring with Prometheus, Grafana, PagerDuty. Outputs alert definitions, severity levels, escalation policies, and runbooks.
skills.promptPreview: Design alerting rules with Prometheus, Grafana, PagerDuty including alert definitions, severity levels, escalation policies, and runbooks.

skills.name: Docker Compose
skills.description: Create production-ready Docker Compose configurations for multi-container applications. Outputs service definitions, networking, volumes, and environment management.
skills.promptPreview: Create a Docker Compose setup with proper networking, volume management, health checks, secrets, and environment-specific overrides.

skills.name: Kubernetes Manifest
skills.description: Create production Kubernetes manifests with deployments, services, ingress, configs, and autoscaling. Outputs complete YAML with best practices.
skills.promptPreview: Create production Kubernetes manifests with deployments, services, ingress, configs, autoscaling, and best practices.

skills.name: Monitoring Setup
skills.description: Setup monitoring with Prometheus, Grafana, alerting. Outputs metrics collection, dashboards, alert rules, and SLO tracking.
skills.promptPreview: Design production monitoring with Prometheus/Grafana stack including SLOs, RED metrics dashboards, alerting, and on-call runbooks.

skills.name: Secrets Management
skills.description: Design secrets management with Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, encrypted storage. Outputs rotation policies, access controls, and audit logging.
skills.promptPreview: Design secrets management with Vault, AWS Secrets Manager including rotation policies, access controls, and audit logging.

skills.name: Terraform Module
skills.description: Production Terraform modules for infrastructure as code. Outputs reusable modules with variables, state management, and CI/CD integration.
skills.promptPreview: Scaffold a reusable Terraform module with variables, outputs, state management, and CI/CD integration for cloud infrastructure.
